title: passiflora pilosa subsp. pilosa
intro: Passiflora pilosa subsp. pilosa is a species of flowering plant in the passionflower family, known for its hairy stems and leaves, and fragrant, white flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its sedative and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Passiflora pilosa subsp. pilosa include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and mood swings. Passiflora pilosa subsp. pilosa can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and health benefits.
